title: Peppery Italian Bread Flour Stir-fry
description: An adventurous Sicilian dish featuring bread flour for a unique texture and peppery notes to spice up the flavor.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add bread flour to the hot pan and stir continuously until it forms a golden brown, crispy texture. Be cautious as it can burn easily.
Stir in paprika and red chili flakes for a peppery kick.
Sprinkle garlic powder on top of the bread flour mixture.
Gradually add water while stirring constantly to prevent clumping and ensure everything is well mixed.
Simmer for about 10 minutes until thickened. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot or at room temperature.
